race.description: Become A Southside Racing Member Hcp (Bm62)
race.comment: KILLIANA (2) finds the right race here third up. She just missed first up at Sale as favourite before an even effort when in the betting at Caulfield Heath against stronger company. Her best form reads well for this, she can take catching. ARTBEAT (8) struggled at his second outing having won quite well at Echuca on debut. He can bounce back here. STELLAR MOFEED (13) has just found one better her past couple, trying hard when narrowly edged out at Ballarat last start. She likes it here and maps for every chance. ANTISOCIAL (3) was safely held last start at Sandown-Lakeside but has claims if she can reproduce her win at Ballarat two starts back.
